title: Deciding whether to move in with partner
story: My partner of two years wants us to move in together, but I keep making excuses to delay the decision. They've found a great apartment and can afford it, but I'm terrified of losing my independence. I've lived alone for six years and have a routine I love - morning runs, late-night reading, having friends over whenever I want. Every time I think about sharing space 24/7, I feel trapped. But I also know I love this person and see a future with them. My friends say I'm overthinking it, but I can't shake the feeling that I'll regret giving up my solo life.
